name: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd.
description: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. provides electronic manufacturing services. The company offers consumer electronics, including smartphones, feature phones, wearable devices, televisions, game consoles, set-top boxes, and audio systems; cloud and networking products comprising routers, servers, edge computing, data centers, and satellite communications and other related equipment; electronic computing equipment, such as desktop computers, laptops, tablets, multi-function devices and printers; and connectors, precision optical components, lenses, electronic components, semiconductor products, and automotive electronic parts. It operates in the United States, Singapore, Ireland, Mainland China, Japan, India, Taiwan, Vietnam, Mexico, and internationally. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
